text: Reaction: After you break a province, bow this stronghold - each conflict declared this round is [conflict-military] instead of its normal type.
name: Castle of the Forgotten

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed, choose a ring in the unclaimed ring pool - resolve that ring's effects and claim it as a [conflict-political] ring, gaining all fate on it.
name: Offerings to the Kami

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed, choose a deck - discard the top 10 cards of that deck.
flavorText: "In emptiness, despair lurks." - Tao of Shinsei
name: Deserted Shrine

text: No attachments except Weapon. Reaction: After you break a province during a conflict in which this character is participating - fill each of your non-stronghold provinces with 1 facedown dynasty card.
name: Repentant Legion

text: Seeker role only. Limited. As an additional cost for a player to declare a character as an attacker during a [conflict-military] conflict, that player must discard 1 card from their hand.
name: Asahina Peacekeeper

text: During [conflict-political] conflicts, each participating character gains pride.
flavorText: "With temperance and grace, you can achieve greatness." - Asahina Takako
name: Fū Sui Temple

text: No attachments except Heresy or Weapon. This character does not bow as the result of conflict resolution during conflicts in which an opponent controls a participating honored or dishonored character.
name: Militant Faithful

text: Action: During a conflict, bow this character unless you have at least 5 more honor than an opponent. Choose another character - until the end of the conflict, that character gets +3[conflict-military], +1[conflict-political] and +1 glory.
name: Conduit of Heroes

text: No attachments except Spell or Spirit. Reaction: After 1 or more fate is removed from a character outside the fate phase, choose a character and select one - either place 1 fate on the chosen character or remove 1 fate from it.
name: Kami of Ancient Wisdom

text: While this character is participating in a conflict it gains each triggered ability on each other participating dishonored character except for abilities granted by instances of this ability.
flavorText: "When you are but one face in a crowd of many, you are everywhere."
name: Shosuro Deceiver

text: Action: Choose a character with the most fate on it among characters in play - dishonor that character.
flavorText: "You shall suffer no dishonor, my lord."
name: Display of Loyalty

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is attacking, remove 1 fate from this character - the attacked province gets -3 strength until the end of the conflict.
name: Open Field Skirmisher

text: No attachments except Weapon. Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose another participating character with no fate on it - that character does not bow as the result of this conflict's resolution.
name: Higashi Kaze Company

text: Reaction: After you break a province during a conflict, if you control a participating Berserker character - draw 3 cards. (Max 1 per conflict.)
flavorText: "In the destruction of your enemies, may you find peace." - Hida Kiyomasa
name: Battle Meditation

text: Play only on a character you control, and only if your control a Shugenja character. Opponents cannot play attachments on attached character.
flavorText: The spirits awoken in Asahina art mirror the artisan's harmonious intent.
name: Tsangusuri Ward

text: Fire role only. Attach to a character you control. Attached character gains the Tattooed trait. Restricted. While attached character is participating in a conflict, each other participating character gains pride.
name: Phoenix Tattoo

text: Action: During a conflict - bow each participating honored or dishonored character.
flavorText: "What have you done, my son..." - Mirumoto Masashige
name: Betrayal of Truth

text: Attach to a Shugenja character. Attached character gains: "Action: Put a character in your dynasty discard pile on the bottom of your dynasty deck. Choose a copy of that character in play - move 1 fate from your fate pool to that character."
name: Ancestral Sight

text: If you have at least 5 more honor than an opponent, reduce the cost to play this card by 1. Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, choose an action ability on a participating character - that character's controller resolves that ability.
name: Battlefield Orders

text: Action: Discard your hand - until the end of the phase, you may look at and play the top card of your conflict deck as if it were in your hand.
flavorText: "You would be a fool to ignore the limitless wisdom of the kami."
name: Calling the Storm

text: Air role only. Reaction: After an opponent's character receives a status token, that opponent chooses another character they control - the chosen character receives the same status token as well.
name: Final Whisper

text: Limited. Reaction: After you break a province, choose a province controlled by the same opponent - place a dishonored status token on that province and reveal it, if able. While a province has a dishonored status token, treat its printed text box as if it were blank (except for Traits).
name: Overrun
